rows.label: xs33660100_MSG0010
rows.name: Meeting you here was a stroke of good fortune.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33660100_MSG0020
rows.name:
I have been surveying the surroundings
to see if there was any way to approach him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33660100_MSG0030
rows.name:
Void is the entity that commands the Growth[ST:wide ]—
He is the mortal enemy who trampled on the pride of us Larsians.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33660100_MSG0040
rows.name:
You need not worry.
I will not commit the folly of charging in alone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33660100_MSG0050
rows.name:
For right now, I have reliable allies[ST:wide ]—
I have you here with me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33660100_MSG0060
rows.name:
Come, let us defeat him together
and fulfill our long-cherished desire.[ST:wait ]
